description: Evidence map linking claim IDs to citations, reviewer, page, date, and risk label. AI answer generation reads from this source only.

evidenceEntries.appliesTo: Adults with insulin resistance, pre-diabetes, or metabolic syndrome
evidenceEntries.whoShouldAvoid: Individuals on insulin or sulfonylureas (monitor closely with clinician)
evidenceEntries.whenToSeekCare: If fasting glucose remains >126 mg/dL after 30 days of protocol adherence
evidenceEntries.reviewedBy: Dr. Shilpa Thakur, Ph.D. Clinical Nutrition

evidenceEntries.appliesTo: General adult population seeking metabolic health improvement
evidenceEntries.whoShouldAvoid: Individuals with eating disorders (consult clinician first)
evidenceEntries.whenToSeekCare: Persistent fatigue, unexplained weight changes, or blood sugar abnormalities
evidenceEntries.reviewedBy: Dr. Shilpa Thakur, Ph.D. Clinical Nutrition

citations.title: Gluten-free diet and thyroid antibodies in Hashimoto's

evidenceEntries.appliesTo: Adults with Hashimoto's thyroiditis and elevated TPO antibodies
evidenceEntries.whoShouldAvoid: Individuals with celiac disease (require separate clinical management)
evidenceEntries.whenToSeekCare: Thyroid antibody levels rising despite dietary changes, or new symptoms
evidenceEntries.reviewedBy: Dr. Shilpa Thakur, Ph.D. Clinical Nutrition

evidenceEntries.whoShouldAvoid: Individuals with advanced liver disease (Grade 3-4, cirrhosis) - requires specialist care
evidenceEntries.whenToSeekCare: Rising liver enzymes, abdominal pain, or jaundice
evidenceEntries.reviewedBy: Dr. Shilpa Thakur, Ph.D. Clinical Nutrition

evidenceEntries.appliesTo: Women with PCOS/PCOD and insulin resistance
evidenceEntries.whoShouldAvoid: Women trying to conceive (consult reproductive endocrinologist)
evidenceEntries.whenToSeekCare: Absent periods for >3 months, severe acne, or hirsutism worsening
evidenceEntries.reviewedBy: Dr. Shilpa Thakur, Ph.D. Clinical Nutrition
